text: DHA pe itna smog hai ke haath bhi nazar nahi aa raha. Aankhein jal rahi hain.
translated: DHA has so much smog you can't see your hand. Eyes are burning.

text: Zero visibility on Ferozpur Road. Multiple near-misses already this morning. Extremely dangerous.
Shahrah-e-Faisal pe accident ho gaya smog ki wajah se. 3 gaariyan takra gayi hain.
translated: Accident on Shahrah-e-Faisal due to smog. 3 cars have collided.

text: Thokar Niaz Baig pe visibility bilkul zero hai. Headlights bhi kaam nahi kar rahi. Ghar pe raho please.
translated: Visibility at Thokar Niaz Baig is absolute zero. Headlights not working. Please stay home.

text: AQI reading 387 at DHA Y-block. This is hazardous. Schools must close immediately.
Ferozpur Road pe lorry ka accident ho gaya. Visibility nahi thi. Ek banda zakhmi hai.
translated: Truck accident on Ferozpur Road due to no visibility. One person injured.

text: Worst smog episode of the year. Main Boulevard DHA looks like a ghost road. Visibility under 50 meters.
Bachon ko school mat bhejo aaj. Ferozpur Road pe saans lena mushkil ho raha hai. Smog bohat zyada hai.
translated: Don't send kids to school today. Hard to breathe on Ferozpur Road. Smog is very heavy.

text: Cantt area completely covered in smog blanket. Airport Road also affected. Flights may be delayed.
Meri maa ko asthma attack aa gaya smog ki wajah se. Hospital le ja raha hun. Koi ambulance help kare.
translated: My mother got an asthma attack due to smog. Taking her to hospital. Someone please help with ambulance.

text: Traffic moving at crawl pace on Shahrah-e-Faisal. Fog lamps mandatory but many cars don't have them. Accident risk very high.
Ferozpur Road toll plaza ke paas 5 gaariyan ek saath takra gayi. RESCUE 1122 bulao jaldi.
translated: 5 cars collided near Ferozpur Road toll plaza. Call RESCUE 1122 quickly.
